title: AI Fluency
description: Evidence-based learning from foundational concepts to pioneering research. Build genuine fluency with AI through interactive exercises, AI-powered feedback, and structured progression.

title: CFA Level I
description: Investment Tools & Foundations. Build mastery in quantitative methods, economics, financial statement analysis, and more.

title: CFA Level II
description: Asset Valuation & Analysis. Apply investment tools to asset valuation through vignette-based case studies.

title: CFA Level III
description: Portfolio Management & Wealth Planning. Synthesize all concepts into portfolio management and wealth planning.

title: Claude Code Mastery
description: From first prompt to autonomous workflows. Learn the mental models, tools, and patterns of thought to make Claude Code work for any problem you face.

title: System Design Mastery
description: From single-server apps to planet-scale distributed systems. Build the mental models and design instincts that separate senior engineers from everyone else.

title: Web Fundamentals
description: Code literacy for the AI age. Learn to read, understand, and troubleshoot HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — not to write code from scratch, but to verify what AI writes for you.

title: React Literacy
description: Code literacy for the React era. Learn to read, navigate, and troubleshoot React applications — not to become a React developer, but to review what AI builds for you.

title: Texas Hold'em Poker
description: Master poker math and decision-making through rapid-fire drills. Hand rankings, outs, pot odds, expected value, and position play — trained to automaticity.
